items.label: ModCase: Check precedent
items.description: Pick a rule/reason and see how the team handled similar past decisions.

items.label: ModCase: Record correction
items.description: Manually store a privacy-conscious precedent record without taking action on Reddit.

items.label: ModCase: Team insights
items.description: Open the aggregate report picker: rule health, trends, contested rules, second review, drift, constitution, transparency, audit, and export.

items.label: ModCase: Sync rules
items.description: Import subreddit rules into the controlled ModCase reason-label map.

items.label: ModCase: Unknown cleanup
items.description: Remap recent Unknown / Unmapped precedent into a controlled reason bucket.

items.label: ModCase: Training mode
items.description: Practice against a past precedent example and reveal the team decision.

items.label: ModCase: Settings
items.description: Set retention and lookup-history limits for this subreddit install.

items.label: ModCase: Seed demo data
items.description: Populate this install with demo history for testing and judging.

items.label: ModCase: Debug log count
items.description: Show how many raw ModAction payloads were captured for verification.
